svg.title: IssueForge multi-agent architecture
svg.desc: A five-agent pipeline: GitHub issue feeds into an Orchestrator which fans out to four specialist agents — Explorer, Planner, Coder, and Reviewer — that converge into a pull request output. A Memory store is bidirectionally connected to the Orchestrator.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What kinds of GitHub issues can IssueForge handle?')
sendPrompt('How does the IssueForge Orchestrator decide which agents to invoke?')
sendPrompt('What does the IssueForge Memory store hold?')
sendPrompt('What does the Explorer agent do in IssueForge?')
sendPrompt('What does the Planner agent do in IssueForge?')
sendPrompt('What does the Coder agent do in IssueForge?')
sendPrompt('What does the Reviewer agent do in IssueForge?')
sendPrompt('What does an IssueForge pull request output look like?')
